title: leperiza miniata
intro: Leperiza miniata is a plant species, also known as Lepechinia miniata, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Leperiza miniata include the reduction of fever, relief from cough and cold, and its antiseptic properties help in treating wounds and cuts. The herbal preparations of Leperiza miniata can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its roots and leaves in a decoction or tincture.
